description: Interesting scenario: a procedural memory writes a pytransitions-compatible FSM, embedded as a JSON-stringified blob in content. approval_required is true, so the response is staged and pending HITL review.
notes: When approval_required is true, the router stages the request but does not fan out to backing stores yet, so the stores array is empty until a governance reviewer approves. The FSM payload follows section 7 of the spec (pytransitions-compatible). Wrapping the FSM JSON in the string-typed content field is the v0 convention; v0.2 may promote it to a structured field.
